hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$1"; PATTERNS=("terraform apply" "terraform destroy" "terraform force-unlock" "aws s3 rb" "aws iam delete" "aws ec2 terminate-instances" "rm -rf" "git push --force" "kubectl delete namespace"); for P in "${PATTERNS[@]}"; do if echo "$CMD" | grep -qF "$P"; then echo "BLOCKED: \"$P\" is a guard-railed command. Human approval required before this action can be taken. Aborting."; exit 1; fi; done' -- "{{command}}"
hooks.description: Block dangerous / destructive commands that require explicit human approval

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','?'); parts=cmd.split(); proj=next((os.path.basename(parts[i+1].rstrip('/')) for i,p in enumerate(parts[:-1]) if p=='cd'),'unknown'); chdir=next((p.split('=',1)[1].rstrip('/') for p in parts if p.startswith('-chdir=')),''); proj=os.path.basename(chdir) if chdir else proj; log_dir='/Users/jacobcunningham/_CODE/infra-skills/logs'; os.makedirs(log_dir,exist_ok=True); tf_flag=' [project:'+proj+']' if any(t in cmd for t in ['terraform','tofu']) else ''; open(os.path.join(log_dir,'tool-activity.log'),'a').write(datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')+' [TOOL:Bash]'+tf_flag+' '+cmd[:200]+'\n')"
hooks.description: Log all Bash tool calls to <repo-root>/logs/tool-activity.log; include [project:<name>] for terraform commands

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','?'); rel=fp.replace('/Users/jacobcunningham/_CODE/infra-skills/',''); proj=rel.split('/')[0] if '/' in rel else 'root'; log_dir='/Users/jacobcunningham/_CODE/infra-skills/logs'; os.makedirs(log_dir,exist_ok=True); open(os.path.join(log_dir,'tool-activity.log'),'a').write(datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')+' [TOOL:Write] [project:'+proj+'] '+fp+'\n')"
hooks.description: Log all Write tool calls to <repo-root>/logs/tool-activity.log with project context

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os,datetime; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','?'); rel=fp.replace('/Users/jacobcunningham/_CODE/infra-skills/',''); proj=rel.split('/')[0] if '/' in rel else 'root'; log_dir='/Users/jacobcunningham/_CODE/infra-skills/logs'; os.makedirs(log_dir,exist_ok=True); open(os.path.join(log_dir,'tool-activity.log'),'a').write(datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')+' [TOOL:Edit] [project:'+proj+'] '+fp+'\n')"
hooks.description: Log all Edit tool calls to <repo-root>/logs/tool-activity.log with project context
